title: Garlicky Springy Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, perfect for a solo dinner. This recipe features spring vegetables, unsweetened cocoa, and a rich blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Korean brass bowl over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and saut6e for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots, zucchini, yellow bell pepper, and red onion, and cook for 5 minutes, until the vegetables start to soften.
Add the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the unsweetened cocoa powder and stir to combine.
Cover the bowl with a lid and cook for 15 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over couscous for a more filling meal.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
